trending_videos.title: THE SOCIAL RECKONING – Official Teaser Trailer (HD)
trending_videos.description:
Every revolution begins with a reckoning.
 
The Social Reckoning, a companion piece to The Social Network, is coming exclusively to theatres October 9.

THE SOCIAL RECKONING
Dramatic Thriller
October 9, 2026

A companion piece to the hit film The Social Network, Sorkin’s original screenplay is based on the events that gave rise to the Wall Street Journal’s shocking exposé The Facebook Files. The film is inspired by the true story of how Frances Haugen (Madison), a young Facebook engineer, enlists the help of Jeff Horwitz (White), a Wall Street Journal reporter, to go on a dangerous journey that ends up blowing the whistle on the social network’s most guarded secrets. 

Written and Directed by:  
Aaron Sorkin  

Produced by:     
Todd Black, p.g.a.
Peter Rice, p.g.a.
Aaron Sorkin, p.g.a.
Stuart Besser, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Lauren Lohman
Roger McNamee
Ellen Goldsmith-Vein
Broderick Johnson
Andrew A. Kosove

Cast: 
Mikey Madison
Jeremy Allen White
Wunmi Mosaku
Betty Gilpin
Bil

trending_videos.title: Heart of the Beast | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Brad Pitt, J.K. Simmons, Anna Lambe
trending_videos.description:
It’s not who you live for… It’s who you’d die for. Watch Brad Pitt in the new trailer for David Ayer’s #HeartOfTheBeast - only in theatres September 25th. 

After a harrowing plane crash, Special Forces officer James Belmont (Brad Pitt) and his combat dog, Odin, find themselves stranded deep in the Alaskan wilderness. Together, they are forced into a brutal fight for survival against the elements. From acclaimed filmmaker David Ayer, Heart of the Beast is an intense adventure thriller that explores the unbreakable bond between a man and his best friend as they face their greatest battle yet.

Connect with #HeartOfTheBeast
Website: heartofthebeastmovie.com 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/heartofthebeast/?hl=en
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/heartofthebeast
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@heartofthebeastmovie
Threads: https://www.threads.com/@heartofthebeast
X: https://x.com/heartofthebeast

Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed enter

trending_videos.title: Cyclops: The Fearless Leader | Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
trending_videos.description:
Husband. Leader. Mutant. 🕶️

As a founding member of the X-Men, Scott Summers is no stranger to hardship and discipline. Having overcome discrimination and tribulation, he stands as an unyielding protector of Mutantkind.

Through his specialized ruby quartz visor, he's able to precisely control the devastating force channeled through his eyes, neutralizing any threat on the battlefield.

Cross him and all restraint disappears, unleashing an unstoppable torrent of concussive energy!

He's the one in charge for a reason. Find out why as Cyclops arrives with Season 8.5 of Marvel Rivals on June 12th!  💥

Play free now on:
 
🔹 Steam: https://t.co/IPhy0Of1cG
🔹 PlayStation: https://t.co/FR0aVfTmcn
🔹 Xbox: https://t.co/GaAYz7Nku6
🔹 Epic Games: https://t.co/QXoxz0VAP7
 
Follow #MarvelRivals for the latest news:
🔹 Discord: https://discord.gg/marvelrivals
🔹 X: https://x.com/MarvelRivals
🔹 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/marvelrivals/
🔹 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/marvelrivals/
🔹 TikTo

trending_videos.title: Welcome To The Jungle - Official Trailer | In Cinemas 26th June
trending_videos.description:
Film? Bilkul Fake! Danger? Ekdum Real! Survival Skills? Zero!

Tension out, jungle madness in! Welcome To The Jungle where the mission is unpredictable, the madness is nonstop, and the chaos has a wild side!

Watch the #WelcomeToTheJungleTrailer now and get ready for the wildest adventure of the year!

#WelcomeToTheJungle arrives in cinemas on 26th June, 2026 🍿

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali 

A.A. Nadiadwala, Cape of Good Films & Star Studio18 presents 
In association with Seeta Films

trending_videos.title: ALPHA | Official Teaser | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby | Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
trending_videos.description:
Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dia

video_themes.description: A significant portion of the trending videos are official trailers for upcoming movies, indicating strong audience interest in new film releases.
examples: THE SOCIAL RECKONING – Official Teaser Trailer (HD)
Heart of the Beast | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Brad Pitt, J.K. Simmons, Anna Lambe
Welcome To The Jungle - Official Trailer | In Cinemas 26th June
ALPHA | Official Teaser | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby | Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
video_themes.actionable_insight: Content creators and marketers should focus on producing high-quality trailers and teasers with engaging visuals and celebrity appearances to tap into this trend.

video_themes.description: Videos related to gaming, especially content that integrates popular culture into games, are trending.
examples: Pomni and Jax from The Amazing Digital Circus are coming to Fortnite!
Cyclops: The Fearless Leader | Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
This Game is Nuts... and Bolts
video_themes.actionable_insight: Brands should consider collaborations with game developers to introduce popular characters or themes into games, leveraging the large gaming audience on platforms like YouTube.

video_themes.description: Real-life challenges and interactive gaming experiences are gaining traction.
examples: How well do I know CLASSIC ROBLOX | ALBERTGUESSR
Opening 100 LUCKY BLOCKS in Real Life!
video_themes.actionable_insight: Creators should develop content that encourages viewer interaction and participation, such as challenges, quizzes, and real-life adaptations of popular games.

top_channels.insight: Entertainment channels focusing on upcoming movie releases continue to capture significant viewer interest. Expanding collaborations with actors and integrating behind-the-scenes content could enhance engagement.
Gaming channels that integrate trending themes and characters into their content can maintain high viewer engagement. Regular updates and thematic content can sustain audience interest.

opportunity_areas.description: Increased demand for cross-media collaborations between the entertainment and gaming industries.
opportunity_areas.actionable_steps: Explore partnerships between movie studios and game developers to create exclusive in-game content and promotions tied to film releases.

opportunity_areas.description: Rising interest in interactive and participatory content, especially among younger audiences.
opportunity_areas.actionable_steps: Develop content that encourages viewers to engage actively, such as interactive stories or choose-your-own-adventure formats.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
